title: paspalum yecorae
intro: Paspalum yecorae is a type of perennial grass native to South America, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Paspalum yecorae include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Paspalum yecorae is often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to make a tea for its therapeutic benefits.
